axes.claim: n=6 core arithmetic identity sigma(6)*phi(6) == 6*tau(6) == J_2(6) == 24 holds (the structural seed of the entire architecture; if violated, every downstream derivation collapses).
axes.cmd: python3 -c "from math import gcd; sigma=lambda n:sum(i for i in range(1,n+1) if n%i==0); tau=lambda n:sum(1 for i in range(1,n+1) if n%i==0); phi=lambda n:sum(1 for k in range(1,n+1) if gcd(k,n)==1); print(int(sigma(6)*phi(6)==6*tau(6) and sigma(6)*phi(6)==24))"
axes.expect: stdout='1' (verified live: sigma(6)=12, phi(6)=2, tau(6)=4, product 24)

axes.claim: atlas/n6_core_constants.hexa sha256 prefix = 07852a186b51 (SSOT freeze marker; this 55-line file is the sole human-edited source for SIGMA=12 / TAU=4 / PHI=2 / N=6 / SOPFR=5 / J2=24; n6shared/_shared_constants is auto-derived).

Cross-domain prediction triangulation: atlas formula '@F sm_blackwell = sigma * phi^tau = 192' predicts NVIDIA Blackwell GB202 SM count = 12 * 2^4 = 192 (architecture domain ↔ number-theory primitives sigma/phi/tau). Drift in atlas line removes the published prediction anchor.
axes.cmd: grep -E '^@F sm_blackwell = sigma \* phi\^tau = 192' /Users/ghost/core/n6-architecture/atlas/atlas.n6 | wc -l | tr -d ' '
axes.doc: atlas/atlas.n6 §Formulas (sm_volta=64, sm_ampere=128, sm_ada=144, sm_blackwell=192, sm_amd=220) — public falsifiable claim against NVIDIA published spec

axes.claim: Cross-domain triangulation: '@C sigma_sq = sigma^2 = 144' predicts NVIDIA Ada AD102 total SM = 12^2 = 144 (architecture ↔ algebra). This is the simplest sigma-power formula and the strongest published prediction (NVIDIA Ada AD102 spec confirms 144 SM).
axes.doc: atlas/atlas.n6 §Constants — verified by verify_alien10.py per atlas comment

axes.claim: Atlas contains exactly 6 grade-[11*] foundation entries (n, sigma, tau + 3 promoted virtual hub mirrors per commit 98a23750). Grade-11 = top-of-spectrum verified primitive; count drift signals unauthorized promotion/demotion of foundation atoms.

Proposal 'dup_derivation_consolidation_phase2_2026_04_24.md' sha256 prefix = c2e6c6c31903 (the proposal that retired per-domain inline constants in favor of n6shared/_shared_constants auto-gen; its freeze prevents silent regression of the SSOT consolidation).
SECURITY.md sha256 prefix = ec4723dc0dcc (commit 3f12168e — Honesty-Triad mode-6 precondition; first session add). Removal/edit signals withdrawal of disclosure floor for cross-prediction claims.

tier_1_rationale: core-arithmetic-identity = the seed (every other axis depends on it). core-constants-ssot = freeze marker for the 6-value vector. blackwell-192 + ada-144 = strongest published cross-domain predictions (number-theory → real NVIDIA hardware) — these triangulate atlas claims against external ground truth. grade-11-star-count = monotone foundation floor. Tier-2 (paradigm-shift-proposal-sha + SECURITY.md-sha) covers governance freeze but is supporting, not load-bearing.

main_thread_action_required: user-go for atlas merge + falsifier promote — F147-F153 staged here as raw71 SUGGEST mode (no auto-write to design/hexa_sim/falsifiers.jsonl). On user-go: append 7 records, recompute falsifier_registry.sha256, refresh hive index. bulk_audit_anti_pattern_avoidance.scout_warning: scout caveated 113 verify_*.hexa harnesses (per-scout claim) have <10% novel beyond existing F100/F90 N6HIST + F126-F132 cross-engine coverage. Bulk-promoting one falsifier per harness would violate raw 73 admissibility (low-density witnesses).
bulk_audit_anti_pattern_avoidance.actual_verify_count: n6-architecture has 38 domain-level verify_*.hexa + ~30+ experiments/anomaly/verify_bt*.hexa + 54 scanners/*.claim.json — closer to ~120 total, matching scout estimate.
bulk_audit_anti_pattern_avoidance.strategy_used: promote 7 axes that each cover a DIFFERENT abstraction level: (1) live arithmetic re-execution [F147], (2) SSOT file freeze [F148], (3-4) two cross-prediction triangulations to NVIDIA hardware [F149/F150], (5) grade-floor count invariant [F151], (6-7) governance proposals/SECURITY freeze [F152/F153]. Zero overlap with per-domain verify_*.hexa harnesses (those are absorbed by N6HIST series, not re-promoted).
bulk_audit_anti_pattern_avoidance.no_per_domain_pump: did NOT promote a falsifier per quantum-computer/fusion/aerospace/etc verify_*.hexa file — those are the 'bulk' that scout warned about. Cross-prediction triangulation requires an EXTERNAL anchor (NVIDIA spec) which only architecture-domain entries cleanly possess; physics-domain @? unknowns (dark_energy_ratio, hubble_tension, fine_structure) deliberately excluded as too speculative for tier-1 (raw 73 false-positive risk).

cold_start_cost_estimate.actual_includes: n6-arch repo inventory (atlas + scanners + domains + proposals listing) + atlas.n6 head/middle read (250 lines of 21800) + 7 candidate cmd verification + sha256 batch (4 files + 8 cmd_sha) + witness write
cold_start_cost_estimate.interpretation: scout 40x conservative — n6-architecture matches the predicted pattern (mature SSOT + canonical atlas + claim manifests = front-loaded discovery). 3 of 3 scouts now overshoot 36-45× when target repo has well-curated docs; pattern is now empirically established with n=3 ω-cycles. Future scout estimates for repos with atlas/SSOT files should default to 5-10 min cold-start budget.
cold_start_cost_estimate.pattern_confirmation: PATTERN HOLDS: hexa-lang 45x + anima 36x + n6-arch 40x → arithmetic mean 40.3x scout overshoot. Recommend scout_estimate_default_seconds = wall_clock / 40 for atlas-bearing repos.

ROI_assessment.rationale: 7 anchors verified single session, 5 promote-worthy Tier-1, 2 supporting (paradigm-shift proposal + SECURITY.md governance). Cross-prediction triangulation axis is GENUINELY new — neither hexa-lang stdlib (F133-F139, internal-purity axis) nor anima Mk-XI (F140-F146, ML-substrate axis) overlapped with NVIDIA-hardware-grounded predictions.
ROI_assessment.scout_medium_correct: MEDIUM (not HIGH) is accurate — atlas has 9631 entries but only ~6 grade-[11*] foundation primitives + ~30 strong [10*] cross-predictions; ROI ceiling is ~10-15 cross-prediction falsifiers max before saturation. Beyond that, additional axes are restating per-domain verify_*.hexa work that N6HIST already covers.
ROI_assessment.raw_73_admissibility: honest — F149/F150 NVIDIA cross-predictions are the strongest claim but rely on NVIDIA published spec staying current (if NVIDIA renames/discontinues a chip, the cross-prediction becomes stale even though atlas is unchanged). False-positive risk acknowledged: atlas claim 'fine_structure ~ 1/(sigma*sigma-sopfr) = 1/139' is a [4?] hypothesis (not verified) — deliberately NOT promoted.
ROI_assessment.honest_caveat: MEDIUM (not HIGH) because: (a) cross-prediction triangulation depends on external NVIDIA spec freeze (out of repo control), (b) 38 domain verify_*.hexa harnesses are largely structural-assert stubs ('assert n==6') with low novel falsification value beyond N6HIST coverage, (c) physics @? unknown entries (dark_energy_ratio, hubble_tension, fine_structure) are interesting but [2-4] grade — promoting them risks raw 73 violation (tier-1 with hypothesis-level evidence).
